required_skills: Cloud Platform Engineering on AWS, GCP, or Azure
preferred_skills: Platform Product Thinking and Developer Experience
Service Level Objective Definition and Alerting
responsibilities: Design and operate a self-service Internal Developer Platform that abstracts cloud complexity and accelerates engineering team onboarding and delivery velocity
Build and maintain production-grade Kubernetes clusters with multi-tenant isolation, RBAC policies, and automated node lifecycle management
Architect and codify cloud infrastructure using Terraform and Helm to ensure reproducible, version-controlled, and auditable environment provisioning
Implement GitOps-based continuous delivery workflows using ArgoCD or FluxCD to enable declarative, drift-free application deployments
Design and maintain a unified observability stack with Prometheus, Grafana, and distributed tracing to provide full-stack production visibility
Enforce platform security standards through policy-as-code frameworks such as Kyverno and Open Policy Agent across all cluster workloads
Manage secrets and credentials infrastructure using HashiCorp Vault with dynamic secret generation, rotation, and audit logging
Optimize cloud spending across multi-cloud environments by implementing tagging standards, rightsizing recommendations, and reserved capacity planning
Collaborate with application engineering teams to define platform contracts, SLOs, and onboarding runbooks that reduce time-to-production for new services
Conduct platform reliability reviews and gameday simulations to validate failover behavior, auto-scaling thresholds, and disaster recovery procedures
